Today is day […]

data.title: Massive $SHIB Giveaway: 30M+ Up for Grabs in Epic ‘Legends Quest’
data.description:
Astra Nova just kicked off with The Legends Quest and it’s shaping up to be the project’s biggest push yet to bring its growing Web3 gaming world closer to the Shiba Inu community. This new campaign, which launched Monday, features more than 30 million Shiba Inu ($SHIB) tokens in monthly rewards. That’s right—30 million SHIB, ready to be claimed by anyone who can climb the leaderboard.   It’s a clever way to drive engagement ahead of something bigger: Astra Nova says this whole quest is leading up to a major collaboration announcement with the Shiba Inu ecosystem, expected very soon
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/06/13/massive-shib-giveaway-30m-up-for-grabs-in-epic-legends-quest/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=massive-shib-giveaway-30m-up-for-grabs-in-epic-legends-quest

data.title: Trump: Israeli attack is good for markets because Iran can't get a nuclear weapon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the Wall Street Journal, US President Trump said that he and his team knew in advance about Israel's plan to attack Iran. In a brief telephone interview on Friday morning, when asked what kind of warning the United States received before the attack, Trump said: "Warning? This is not a warning. But we know what is happening. I talked with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu on Thursday and plan to talk to him again on Friday. The attack will be good for the market because Iran cannot obtain nuclear weapons." (Jinshi)

data.title: Security Flaw Detected in Virgen Points System
data.description: According to Foresight News, a member of the Virtual team, identified as @miratisu_ps, has confirmed the presence of a vulnerability in the Virgen Points system. Approximately 6% of wallets have been affected by this issue. Details regarding the nature of the vulnerability and plans for its resolution have not yet been disclosed.

data.title: MicroStrategy executives buy $1.3 million in preferred stock
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to disclosed information, several MicroStrategy insiders recently purchased a total of approximately US$1.3 million in company preferred shares.

data.title: Cardano co-founder proposes to exchange $100 million ADA for Bitcoin and stablecoins to support DeFi
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Cardano co-founder Charles Hoskinson recently said in a live broadcast that it is recommended to convert $100 million ADA tokens into stablecoins (such as USDM, USDA) and part of Bitcoin within the Cardano ecosystem to promote the development of Bitcoin DeFi. He responded to outside doubts that the sale may affect the price of ADA, saying "this is an inexperienced view" and emphasized that this move will not cause any problems.
Hoskinson hopes to increase the ratio of stablecoin issuance to TVL from the current approximately 10% to 30%-40% through this plan. According to DefiLlama data, Cardano's current TVL is $356 million, and the issuance of stablecoins on the chain is only $31 million. In contrast, Solana's TVL is $9.8 billion and its stablecoin issuance has reached $11 billion.
Hoskinson said in a tweet that the lagging development of stablecoins is "dragting down Cardano", and the proposal can bring "non-inflationary income" and promote the construction of Cardano DeFi economy. It is worth noting that Cardano Foundation CEO Frederik Gregaard said in March that TVL is not an indicator for measuring ecosystem adoption. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Indicates Shift in Cryptocurrency Market
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinmarketcap reveals that the Altcoin Season Index is currently at 25, after reaching 30 on June 11. This index indicates that in the past 90 days, 25 out of the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization have outperformed Bitcoin.

The CMC Altcoin Season Index is a real-time metric used to assess whether the cryptocurrency market is experiencing a period dominated by altcoins. It is based on the performance of the top 100 altcoins relative to Bitcoin over the last 90 days.

data.title: Binance to Host Discord AMA on Technical Analysis with Rewards
data.description: According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to host an Ask Me Anything (AMA) session on its Discord channel, focusing on Technical Analysis. Scheduled for 2025-06-13 at 14:00 (UTC), this session aims to educate participants on reading candlesticks and using indicators like RSI and MACD. It is designed for beginners and traders eager to enhance their market understanding.Participants in the AMA have the opportunity to win $150 worth of Binance SWAG and Red Packets. To be eligible, users must ask insightful questions related to the AMA topic in the #global-chat using the hashtag #BinanceAMA. Binance will select ten winners, each receiving $5 in USDC. Additionally, attendees who participate throughout the entire session will share a $70 prize pool in USDC Red Packets. The first three users to correctly answer a question at the end of the AMA will win exclusive Binance SWAG items.Eligibility for rewards requires users to complete identity verification (KYC). Winners will be announced in the #discord-news channel within a day after the event concludes. Red Packets will be distributed to winners' Spot Accounts within 14 business days. Those qualifying for Binance SWAG must contact the activity manager via Discord within a week to arrange reward delivery. Delivery of Binance SWAG may take up to 30 business days, with geographical restrictions potentially resulting in a Red Packet of equivalent value. Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants for fraudulent behavior or interference with program operations. The company may amend terms and conditions at its discretion without prior notice.

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches Roam (ROAM), Airdrop Available for Eligible Users
data.description: Binance Alpha has officially launched Roam (ROAM). Users with at least 247 Alpha points are eligible to claim a 372 ROAM token airdrop starting at 21:00 (UTC+8) on June 13 via the Alpha event page.Claiming the airdrop will deduct 15 Alpha points, and users must complete the process within 24 hours of the claim window opening. Unclaimed airdrops will be forfeited.﻿

data.title: LBank wins Bitcoin.com Top 3 Best Exchange Award
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin.com's latest report shows that LBank is the world's top 3 best exchange in June and has become an ideal platform for altcoin traders. The report points out that LBank is known for "quickly launching new coins" and providing excellent liquidity for currencies. As the fastest growing emerging asset trading platform, LBank has a simple and intuitive interface and an efficient matching engine, which continues to bring users rich investment opportunities with growth potential.

data.title: A whale spent $9.64 million to buy 3,810 ETH

data.title: Thierry Baudet’s Crypto Vision Sparks Debate at Dutch Blockchain Week
data.description:
At Dutch Blockchain Week 2025, Thierry Baudet, the face of the Forum for Democracy (FvD), charted an ambitious roadmap for a blockchain-driven future. His vision cuts out conventional banking systems, offering instead a financial ecosystem untethered from state control. From directly handling salaries in crypto to streamlining everyday purchases, Baudet painted blockchain as more than.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/thierry-baudets-crypto-vision-sparks-debate-at-dutch-blockchain-week/

data.title: Gold-Backed Tokens Rally as Investors Seek Stability Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description:
TL;DR Gold-backed tokens such as Tether Gold and PAX Gold have gained over 30% so far this year, emerging as a refuge amid the Israel-Iran conflict. Meanwhile, Bitcoin and Ethereum suffer sharp declines. The growing demand for stable assets boosts the appeal of crypto assets tied to tangible commodities, solidifying their role in today’s volatile. . .

data.title: When Binance Alpha Points reaches 247, you can spend 15 Alpha Points to redeem 372 ROAM airdrops
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Alpha platform announced that it has launched the Roam (ROAM) airdrop claim event. Starting from 21:00 on June 13, Beijing time, qualified users with at least 247 Alpha points can claim 372 ROAM tokens on the Alpha event page.
This claim will consume 15 Alpha points, and users must complete the claim within 24 hours after the opening. Overdue will be deemed as abandonment.
